titles.romaji: Shinshaku Sengoku Eiyuu Densetsu: Sanada Juu Yuushi The Animation
titles.native: 新釈 戦国英雄伝説 眞田十勇士 The Animation
synonyms: New Legend of the Heroes of the Warring Nations - The Ten Sanada Brave Soldiers Sanada 10 TV
titles.tmdb_title: Shinshaku Sengoku Eiyuu Densetsu Sanada Juu Yuushi The Animation

description:
In the Fifth Year of the Keicho era, the Tokugawa clan sought to solidify their control of Japan. Hidetada Tokugawa has come to the doorsteps of Ueda Castle with the intentions of having the Sanada clan open its doors to him. But the Sanada and their retainers have other plans...

(Source: Anime News Network)
